briefdescription.para: Flag to check completion of Transmission.
Flag to check completion of Reception.
Searching for the required Slave Address and user can also add their own slave Address in the below array list.
This table contains configuration information for each IIC device in the system.
This function checks the availability of a slave using slave monitor mode.
This function is the handler which performs processing to handle data events from the IIC.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context such that the amount of processing performed should be minimized.
This handler provides an example of how to handle data for the IIC and is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: contains a callback reference from the driver, in this case it is the instance pointer for the IIC driver.
contains the specific kind of event that has occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the availability of a slave using slave monitor mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the Device ID of the IicPs Device and is the XPAR_<IICPS_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h

briefdescription.para: This function perform the initial configuration for the IICPS Device.

parameterdescription.para: instance and Interrupt ID mapped to the device.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether the slave in alive or not.
Main function to call the Slave Monitor example.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful, XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful.

briefdescription.para: This example runs on zynqmp / versal / vek385 evaluation boards using the IIC device as master to check slave's availability.

simplesect.para: Please set the slave address to 0x3FB, which tests the device's ability to handle 10-bit address.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a jz 01/30/10 First release 3.18 gm 07/14/23 Added SDT support. 3.21 an 03/28/25 Added VEK385 board i2c slave address
